name: DOT/FMCSA Compliance MCP
description:
Query DOT/FMCSA trucking regulations (49 CFR Parts 350-399, Hazardous Materials) with plain-English summaries. Built for AI agents, fleet management software, and trucking compliance tools.

Tools:
- lookup_dot_standard: Search 49 CFR standards by topic, keyword, or section number
- get_hos_rules: Hours of Service requirements for property, passenger, and hazmat carriers
- get_violation_info: FMCSA violation codes with severity weights and descriptions
- get_dot_penalties: Current DOT penalty amounts by violation category
- get_hazmat_info: Hazmat classifications, labeling, placarding, and training requirements
- check_csa_basic: CSA BASIC categories, intervention thresholds, and severity ratings

Data: 23 penalty categories, 11 HOS rules, 7 CSA BASICs, 30+ violation codes, all 9 hazmat classes.

Use cases: Fleet management apps, trucking compliance software, ELD vendors, CSA score monitoring tools, hazmat transport software.
